title: carlina corymbosa subsp. major
intro: Carlina corymbosa subsp. major, also known as the giant carline thistle or giant carline, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Carlina corymbosa subsp. major can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
